payload.answer: Sam left Goldman last month and joined Point72; he still listens to Bill Evans, lately more early Coltrane; and he wants to catch up about AI infra and receive the article.
citations: Sam: No, I left Goldman last month and joined Point72
Daniele: Still listening to Bill Evans?
Sam: Yes, but lately more early Coltrane
Daniele: We should catch up about AI infra
Sam: Definitely, send me that article
